canonical_question: What is the SAP API deprecation policy - 2-year minimum support, 1-year decommission notice?
aliases: SAP API lifecycle states and deprecation timelines
How long does SAP support deprecated APIs before decommissioning?
SAP release contracts C0 C1 C2 C3 stability guarantees
SAP Clean Core API tiering Level A B C D
constraints: SAP will not deprecate an API sooner than 2 years after initial release
Decommission occurs no sooner than 1 year after deprecation announcement
Only Level A (released) APIs carry formal stability contracts; Levels B-D have no upgrade guarantees
Release contracts (C0-C3) define stability scope per object type, not blanket backward compatibility
Product-specific policies (SuccessFactors, Ariba, Concur) may define shorter or longer notice periods
Classic ABAP APIs (Level B) are generally upgrade-stable but have no formal contract

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs Salesforce API deprecation policy
User needs Oracle ERP Cloud API deprecation policy
User needs SAP S/4HANA OData API capabilities and rate limits

options: SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public or Private Edition)

inputs_needed.question: What Clean Core level does your extension target?
options: Level A (released APIs only, ABAP Cloud)
